metadata.description:
Angel One is for Everyone. Built on over 25 years of experience, it is trusted by 3.5 crore+ Indians. We're transforming the way people invest and make informed investment choices.

Angel One app is a powerhouse of capabilities that make investing & trading a truly rewarding experience. Enjoy seamless trading, simplified portfolio analysis, transparency in charges, and lightning-fast trading interactions.

Angel One empowers you to diversify your portfolio and make smart choices. Be it Stocks, Mutual Funds, ETFs, US Stocks, Currencies, Commodities, F&O, Bonds, Loans or Fixed Deposit, Angel One has smart offering for Everyone.

Benefits of Angel One’s share market online trading app
DEMAT Account
● Open free Demat account online & start investing in the stock market
● Easy, safe, paperless KYC for Angel One's free demat account
● Angel One stock trading app onboarding is seamless for online trading

Stocks
● Trade in 5000+ stocks across large cap stocks, midcap stocks & small cap stocks

reviews.author: shshwjbaua
reviews.title: Always shows wrong profit
reviews.content: Very bad app for trading

reviews.author: Mandku
reviews.title: Easy to use
reviews.content: I love this aap for stock market

reviews.author: Vaibhav diyora
reviews.title: Extra charges
reviews.content:
When I joined Angel One, there were no charges for long-term investments, and there was no brokerage fee for long-term investments. However, day by day, they have been increasing their charges, including service charges, brokerage charges, and many other small charges that we are not even aware of.

Please thoroughly check everything before investing.

The app is fast and everything works well since I joined, but now they have added new charges.

reviews.author: Mallegowda
reviews.title: Hidden fees
reviews.content: Stay away from this app. Lot of hidden fees.

reviews.author: Srinivasan52
reviews.title: Sip and mutual funds
reviews.content: Sip orders placed does not gets completed within the given date. It keeps on adding the next days date in the status. I’ve contacted the support to resolve this issue. I’m not satisfied on using angel one.

reviews.author: Trader tut
reviews.title: Dil tuta trader
reviews.content:
Bahut kharab h bhaiya 
Sahab dil tut gaya aap log se kbhi to profit mein close krwa do

reviews.author: Arun Felix
reviews.title: Finally a proper iPad APP
reviews.content: I have been using the new app since it launched in Android, but refused to accept it in iPad because of the lack of proper landscape support in iPad. Am glad that the app keeps on improving with proper landscape support. Only gripe is that the app logs off often, may be due to security concerns (Which I understand). Kudos to Angel one team, keep on improving!

reviews.author: Sahin Sarkar
reviews.title: Good application
reviews.content: Tha Angel one very nice

reviews.author: ManishN19
reviews.title: Ease of Navi Navigation
reviews.content: Super easy and much clarity of data

reviews.author: Shr1999
reviews.title: FRAUD ALERT
reviews.content:
The mobile application will always have glitches during huge movements in the market, not allowing to square off your positions. 
THEY HAVE A FALSE CUSTOMER SERVICE/ INVESTIGATION TEAM. 
Been a month I reported my issue with the customer service, they do not care.

Not a good platform to trade. If you are new beware. They will give you a joining gift of Rs:750, but while trading they will take away a huge chunk of your wealth.

reviews.author: Phantom pyle
reviews.title: Title:- Great app with decent brokerage.
reviews.content: Angel One's customer satisfaction shines through its responsive support team, ensuring users receive timely assistance whenever needed.Very nice broking app .

reviews.author: Gopi krishna 234
reviews.title: Charts are not visible sometimes
reviews.content: I can’t able to see charts  whenever I like to trade!

reviews.author: Wishwa pratap
reviews.title: Problem in apple version of angle
reviews.content: My angle app’s screen is not stable. The screen is being refreshed. It disturbs a lot, please repair it asap.

reviews.author: suryaravuri
reviews.title: Bonds not visible
reviews.content: Unable to access SGB bonds. No customer support. Support APP not working. Different answers from different customer support team.

reviews.author: Avijit1997
reviews.title: Fix the glitch
reviews.content: When i tap on options price, app get closed immediately… please fix it

reviews.author: blackMajor_R
reviews.title: Angel One - Direct Mutual Fund False Advertising
reviews.content:
Each time I open the angel one app, it prompts me with a pop up saying “Direct Mutual Funds are now available on Angel One click here to buy”. On opening the mutual funds page, I don’t see any Direct Mutual funds in the options to buy. They are all “Regular Plans”. 

FALSE Advertising !! Waiting for the fix to come in.

reviews.author: Vinayak Rao Joshi
reviews.title: Message
reviews.content: Perfect I am working with you since last 15-20 years feels no problem except high transaction charges

reviews.author: vijakam
reviews.title: Donot update
reviews.content: New update is not user friendly. Very difficult to understand. Unable to login

reviews.author: Aldruhtcd ning
reviews.title: Error OTP
reviews.content: Please look in to Apple phone it’s error generator OTP sent mail no reply

reviews.author: RKjml
reviews.title: Best app
reviews.content: Best app

reviews.author: Route122
reviews.title: Latest 40.1.0 version released 2 days ago is smooth like silk
reviews.content:
Revised charts. 
Revised order and options journey. 
Real time market data is super fast.
Excited to see what comes next.

reviews.author: ParagGuruji
reviews.title: Cannot see my Mutual Funds portfolio
reviews.content:
This app asks me to install another app called Angel Bee for accessing my mutual funds portfolio which I had created using this app. Moreover, that other app is not available in the US on App Store so now I cannot access my mutual funds until I get back to India! 

Why can’t I have a single place to access all my investments made with Angel Broking? It’s a bit ironic that after renaming your app as Angel “One”, you ask users to get another app based on type of investment!

reviews.author: mayur5449
reviews.title: Very bad app
reviews.content: Old version was very easy to use this is very bad app remove this update.

reviews.author: Puru_2u
reviews.title: Do not see option for MF holdings
reviews.content: MF holding are not visible/available

reviews.author: Ashutosh Kumar Rai
reviews.title: No ROBO order option in this IOS App
reviews.content: Can anybody help me to get the right app?

reviews.author: kumar2019
reviews.title: Worst new UI
reviews.content: If any app upgraded to new UI means it should be user-friendly and provide more features to User. But in angel one quite different. New UI leads user to more confuse and restricted every where. Ex: earlier when I am clicked on closed order able to see the current market value and other details like chart etc. But now nothing is happening. Like this facing so many restrictions. Never expect from Angele one. Totally disappointed. Now it's time to QUITE.

reviews.author: Nash_Knocks
reviews.title: Worst app ever
reviews.content: I tried to cancel my amo order and it’s not modifying and cancelling also. Never expected such worst experience, just because of this I have to make huge loss.

reviews.author: Shabrish23
reviews.title: Angel One, Well Done!
reviews.content:
New UI is intuitive and nice done. You have come a long way and the improvements are visible. 

Please fix the faceID for Apple users and allow it on homepage screen as an option. (Instead of hiding it in settings) 

Keep portfolio pages clean and clutter free with summary of metrics (invested, gained l, loss etc) being captured crisply. Good job

reviews.author: hate anfel one
reviews.title: Worst app
reviews.content: Worst app I have screen recording my orders are executed but in open position there is no position and my margin is also used don’t use this app

reviews.author: SudoTrader
reviews.title: GooglePay error
reviews.content:
When adding funds with google pay I am getting following error past few days.
I have used this earlier and is very convenient for adding funds.

Kindly look into the issue

<Exception><Message>1010</Message></Exception>

reviews.author: Shiraz KI
reviews.title: Bug Fully
reviews.content:
Dear friends i am using this app last 2 month my experience is very bad there is fully bug and there no good support
So if you look good solution for your trading needs i am not recommend this app

reviews.author: ramc49
reviews.title: App has improved a lot
reviews.content: Easy to use and quick most of the time. However needs to allow up to 3 watchlists for tracking investments categories.

reviews.author: Saqib23k
reviews.title: Very slow
reviews.content: App is really slow and crashes a lot. Takes ages to load funds page. Please invest more in getting good developers for your mobile platform. My wife used sharekhan and for sure it has a much better user experience

reviews.author: R442112
reviews.title: Money transfer issue
reviews.content: Unable to deposit money in my Angel broking ID. Yesterday morning 11 AM I have transferred money from my Bank A/c to my Angel broking Account and money gets credited now. Bad experience

reviews.author: hirentrivedi
reviews.title: I want to active robo order
reviews.content:
Hey 

I want to order robo but not happening can you tell us when will this happen

reviews.author: rajdhani vouchers may blr
reviews.title: Non ethical process followed
reviews.content: Customer care never agree to provide customer referral benefits even after giving evidence. Management is dumb and deaf to all complaints raised. Never install this app. Worst experience.

reviews.author: Prakash H Desai
reviews.title: Angel software
reviews.content:
Very useless software 

It gets hanged quite often and I am unable to log in again 

This is happening multi time

reviews.author: Mahesh987
reviews.title: App hang
reviews.content:
After the new update the app started to hang.
Fix the bug

reviews.author: Hexamanish
reviews.title: Stay away from angleborking
reviews.content: They have sold my option due to technical glitch and I am following them from last 2 weeks still not shorted! And on top of it they have send mail as discussed over the phone your issue is resolved! I have never got any call from them, they are just cheating with customers.

reviews.author: Rals31
reviews.title: Worst app for trading
reviews.content: The one thing it has to do you can't do on it. Worst trading app you end up loosing money. Fire the developers.

reviews.author: lets-explore
reviews.title: Too many issues
reviews.content:
This app has lot of issues and need huge improvements, just to name few 
1. After recent update if click on “portfolio” button the app is crashing 
2. After buying/selling the portfolio get reflected on second day (looks like living in 90s)
3. If you want to know how much you transfer and withdraw; you will rollercoaster ride going though 10s of reports and still you will end up calculating manually
4. App crashed for no reason
5. From app you can update only one watchlist 
6. Super difficult to buy stocks if it’s not in your watchlist

reviews.author: bandlamudisiva
reviews.title: Unable to see portfolio
reviews.content:
Hi team,

I’m unable to see portfolio. When I’m trying to go to portfolio app is closing automatically. This is happening from past three days

reviews.author: chetanbmce
reviews.title: Superb
reviews.content: Best app to trade

reviews.author: Yashasvi0714
reviews.title: Banknifty
reviews.content: Jb bhi banknifty open kro app hi bnd ho jata h gjb h

reviews.author: GIRISHKUMAR CH
reviews.title: Soo Good in IOS
reviews.content:
Better and so smooth Interface 
Enjoying 
Keep it up Angelbroking
IOS version is simply AWESOME

reviews.author: indiastory
reviews.title: App is not responding at all
reviews.content: What the heck is this app . After loading the landing page everything seems to be freezed. Useless app

reviews.author: Keshavbhootda
reviews.title: Processing slow
reviews.content: Hello folks, if you are reading this, please do not download this app and platform! Their temporary technical login issue is their permanent issue ! I lost over 4 Millions, and lost due to delaying in trade execution. Please be aware and kindly do not trade! Specially Intraday! Good luck existing users ! And new users please use other platforms zerodha, Upstox or any other !

reviews.author: Jay S D
reviews.title: Has great features but fails login many times
reviews.content: Many times, when I try to log in to mobile app, Keeps giving “session expired” without even logging in to account

reviews.author: Gaurav V Joshi
reviews.title: Lot of issues in the app
reviews.content:
Many a times this app simply hangs and does not even show any data. Being a stock market app, availability is the first prime requirement. If investor or trader can’t get in or out on time what is the use?
Please correct else I shall change the broker. 

Today also I’m facing issues, Apr 22 2021 at 940am.

reviews.author: jimit3195
reviews.title: Worst ever trading app
reviews.content:
Its the worst app for trading as it keeps on freezing . 
Doesn’t let you login for long period of time also when you wanna buy/sell stock it always freezes.do not open your trading account with angel broking until they resolve this app issue. Because of this issue i lost my 1000’s of rupees.

reviews.author: jshuuskoaons
reviews.title: Angel
reviews.content: Its very very very bad experience with this. Please do not open or else you ll loose your money.

reviews.author: SantoshKuP
reviews.title: Good app with lot of scope to make it better
reviews.content:
Hello team,

This is a good  handy app that provides set of features for investment and trading. However, there are areas to improve user experimce, such as 

1) Buy/Sell button at the bottom or to the left. I would prefer at the bottom while placing order. Current placement is just below price selection - Market/Limit that has caused me significant loss due to accidently unknowing market selection wheteas my irder was a limit.

This happened a few times so I am rather using other app such Zerodha which has much better interface.

2) Confirm order should show on full screen so that user can view all details entered before submitting order. 

3) Provide ipad compatible app so that user can take benefit of more screen area with comfort of mibility.

reviews.author: Rajat171991
reviews.title: Worst trading app
reviews.content: Been using this app for few months, this is the worst trading app i have seen. Totally not user friendly. The app design is so complicated for new traders. I have been trying buy same stock for weeks, my order always remain in pending and never gets executed. Front design does not provide much needed information about stocks. Stock chart takes ages to load and very complicated to understand. Overall not good for new traders.

reviews.author: hafdubs
reviews.title: Chart and stop loss dos’t work properly please fix this issue urgently
reviews.content: Some time chart ans stop loss please fix it

reviews.author: hsfvjdxc
reviews.title: Pathetic App and Broker
reviews.content: Angel broking playing a game on the name of margin given for trade . They first give the margin and then take charges plus intrest for the same and sells the shares of customers by own on the name of margin shortfall , also not give proper calculations of margin .

reviews.author: abuyaseen786
reviews.title: Ledger too much problum
reviews.content: Ledger not clear

reviews.author: chkks3690
reviews.title: Worst application pathetic customer service
reviews.content: My password got hacked recently and while calling the customer care,  the concern person said I will call u back . Within 30 min he did call me back with an offer of another Broking company and said your account will be open within 15 min. Except of rectifying my problem the person is more concern to open another account in another broking agency . Worst company and worst customer care service .

reviews.author: Krish.nyc11
reviews.title: Okay but needs lots of improvement
reviews.content:
Hope you guys read my review  and improve the following things in future release 
1) App and website watch list is not sync and it can be improved by adding features like watch list 1, 2, 3, etc and it should allow to add as many uses want. Right now, there is a limit to add watch list. 
2) During the business hours app’s performance slow down (it can be improved by scaling App up during business hours) 
3) It doesn’t provide stock details 
4) You can’t login on website and app at the same time. Hope they allow multiple login in future release. 
5) Session times out while using it so it prevents users to buy or sell stock ASAP. 
6) Can’t generate the report of your transaction history and see it on app itself and if you send it to email then report is not accurate (doesn’t display stock name) 
7) Funds doesn’t provide accurate detail such as how much money you have and how much money you are using as a credit. There should be also feature to stop using credit( ledger) money. 
8) Stock

reviews.author: asdfgtuabdg
reviews.title: Crapiest application
reviews.content: Worst application developed!!!

reviews.author: Sindhu_
reviews.title: App getting worse after each update
reviews.content:
Angel broking app is getting worse after each updates. In the recent times facing a lot of issues with the app. Sometimes its getting logged out and am not able to login again. Sometimes getting timeout issue, and sometimes page is getting stuck. 
Hate using the app.

reviews.author: roylraj
reviews.title: Worst broker with worst app
reviews.content:
The worst app and broker in history trading. No customer service at all i m trying customer care since 2 days and their phone is busy i mean really is this a customer service. App crashes every day even web platform also. How a person can use their service if their service is like this and they r saying themselves NO 1
Really?????

Please go for zerodha or any other like upstox

Never use angel broking

reviews.author: VJ_59
reviews.title: Crashing in certain menus
reviews.content: App crashes when we try to move into derivative analysis page of a scrip. Updating and/or reinstalling the app didn’t work. Fix it.

reviews.author: Abhi1989abji1989
reviews.title: Theif company
reviews.content:
Misguiding and manipulating company
They forward all Custemor’s number in market for manipulation and misguiding peoples

reviews.author: furkanm2577
reviews.title: Too Slow
reviews.content: Too slow processing and sending confirmations and Keep crashing. There are so many times I missed my orders due to slow process which resulting in several losses. Also the prices are not being updated real time. Just can’t work with it. If this doesn’t improve I may switch my brokerage account to other better options for trading.

reviews.author: Andybill11
reviews.title: Poor Application, Need lotta Improvements.
reviews.content: Doesn’t work in Peak Hours properly. Also very troublesome experience during trading. charts are improved but are not working when toggle between timelines.

reviews.author: Icici user1
reviews.title: Need to restart app again after placing order
reviews.content: After I place order always it gets hang . I have to restart app again & login. So pathetic.

reviews.author: ud25191
reviews.title: Performance is worst than ever
reviews.content: Please do something it is going to shut off automatically after 5-6 minuets of use

reviews.author: akssoni
reviews.title: Serious doubt about Angel’s future
reviews.content:
Decade old tech stack. Many orders got missing from order book/portfolio. Reliability is the last thing you can expect from their web or mobile app platform.

Looking for other online broker. Readers, please suggest few.

Thank you.

reviews.author: Kumel619
reviews.title: Keeps crashing
reviews.content: Keeps crshing every 5mins. Lags. Also no watchlist. Need to create new watchlist

reviews.author: Mahek12
reviews.title: Work on making this app stable.
reviews.content: This app has a lot of glitches on my 6S+. It is very difficult to use and irritating.

reviews.author: Aidan Ortonn
reviews.title: Crashing
reviews.content: This new version is full of glitches. Very unstable on my iPhone 6S+. Freeze and crash while using.

reviews.author: Prachi4698
reviews.title: Thankyou
reviews.content: The live streaming of prices really helps a lot. Their online payment has almost every bank covered. Good app.
